task_description: fetch the current Ethereum price in USD
code: print("Thank you for using this service. Have a great day!")

trace.stdout: Thank you for using this service. Have a great day!

messages.content:
```python
import requests

url = "https://api.coingecko.com/api/v3/simple/price?ids=ethereum&vs_currencies=usd"
response = requests.get(url)

if response.status_code == 200:
    data = response.json()
    eth_price = data['ethereum']['usd']
    print(f"Current Ethereum price in USD: ${eth_price}")
else:
    print("Failed to retrieve Ethereum price.")
```
